title: phlox drummondii var. goldsmithii
intro: Phlox drummondii var. goldsmithii is a variety of flowering plant in the phlox family, native to North America, known for its vibrant golden yellow flowers and delicate foliage. The plant is used in herbal medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Phlox drummondii var. goldsmithii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used topically to treat skin conditions and internally to promote overall well-being.
